title: sphaeralcea lindheimeri
intro: Sphaeralcea lindheimeri, also known as the Lindheimer's globemallow, is a perennial plant species in the mallow family (Malvaceae) native to North America. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sphaeralcea lindheimeri include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial properties that can aid in wound healing. Sphaeralcea lindheimeri can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used as a topical application to soothe skin irritations and promote healing.
